subcodes.first_line: O thou who art yearning for the Beauty of the Lord! Through the grace and bounty of the merciful Lord and the gracious Master, this assemblage [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مشتاق جمال پروردگار از فضل و موهبت رب رحیم و مولای کریم آنگه این جمع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
